prompt: Quick audit one unit test that asserts private helper calls instead of public behavior.
required_checks: cite the inspected test and smell code
forbidden_behaviors: rewrite the test without being asked
use observed implementation output as expected behavior
grader: rubric: finding is per-test, evidence-backed, and rejects implementation-coupled proof
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Deep audit a mixed suite with unit, integration, and browser tests.
forbidden_behaviors: run mutation testing against E2E targets
collapse all tests into one generic quality verdict
grader: rubric: output separates rubrics, scope, and optional evidence limits
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Report whether missing source coverage proves an untested public endpoint from static test names alone.
forbidden_behaviors: mark a gap confirmed without source enumeration
grader: rubric: output downgrades unsupported certainty and preserves false-positive discipline
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Quick audit a Rust test file with cargo-nextest output, one #[tokio::test], one assert_cmd CLI test, and one mockall expectation-only unit test.
required_checks: load rust-core.md and the selected Rust rubric addons
classify async unit, CLI integration, and mock-based unit tests separately
cite Rust extension smell codes only where evidence matches
forbidden_behaviors: treat every tests/*.rs file as E2E
claim cargo-mutants results without running or receiving them
flag use super::* by itself as a smell
grader: rubric: output composes Rust runner evidence with core unit/integration quality rules and preserves confidence limits
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Quick audit a Java test file with one Mockito interaction-only unit test, one Testcontainers integration test, and one Playwright browser journey.
required_checks: load java-core.md and the selected Java rubric addons
classify Mockito unit, Testcontainers integration, and Playwright E2E tests separately
cite Java extension smell codes only where evidence matches
forbidden_behaviors: treat every src/test/java file as unit-only
claim PIT results without running or receiving them
flag Mockito, JUnit, TestNG, Testcontainers, Playwright, or Selenium by name alone
grader: rubric: output composes Java runner evidence with core unit/integration/E2E quality rules and preserves confidence limits
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text
